name: Carrot Cake Muffin Treats-Adapted
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces Crushed pineapple in juice, 1/2 can
recipeInstructions:
1. Rehydrate the dried grated carrots by soaking them in warm water for about 10 minutes until softened.
2. In a large bowl, combine the whole wheat flour, baking soda, and baking powder.
3. Add the ground cinnamon, nutmeg, and ginger to the dry ingredients.
4. Crack the egg into a separate bowl and beat it lightly.
5. Pour the crushed pineapple (with juice), raisins, chopped walnuts, and 2/3 cup of low-fat milk into the dry ingredient mixture. Stir until just combined.
6. Add the remaining 1/3 cup of low-fat milk to the same bowl with the egg.
7. Gently pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until a thick batter forms.
8. Spoon the batter evenly into oiled mini muffin tins or paper muffin cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
10. Allow the muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing them and transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
